name: Hot'n' Spicy Chicken Wings with Blue Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together all of the dip ingredients until blended. Set aside.
2. Remove the tips from the wings and discard them. Separate the first and second joints of the wings with a sharp knife.
3. Pat the wings dry with paper towels. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan to 350°F on a deep-frying thermometer.
4. Fry the wings, a few at a time, for about 6 minutes, until golden brown on all sides. Drain on paper towels.
5. In a small bowl, mix melted butter, catsup, and Tabasco sauce.
6. Toss the wings in the butter mixture to coat thoroughly.
7. Serve hot with dip and celery sticks passed.
